use_cases: Dating app interfaces where users swipe right to like or left to reject profiles
Product discovery in e-commerce allowing customers to browse and dismiss items
Decision-making interfaces where users choose between options by swiping
Interactive galleries with dismissible content cards
ai_summary: A swipeable card stack component inspired by Tinder's interaction pattern, featuring drag-to-dismiss functionality with directional shadow feedback. Users can swipe cards left or right to dismiss them, with green and red shadows indicating swipe direction. The component manages card state, swipe thresholds, and animated transitions.
